style: Style: clean stylized mobile game asset, flat vibrant colors with subtle shading, crisp edges, no text, no watermark, single subject centered, isolated on a plain solid #00FF00 green background, similar to Kenney / Supercell art style.

assets.name: ground_asphalt
assets.prompt: Perfectly seamless tileable texture of dark gray asphalt road surface, top-down orthographic view, fine grain with tiny speckles and very subtle cracks, flat even lighting, no shadows, no objects, no markings, stylized look for a cartoon mobile game, edges must tile seamlessly.

assets.name: ground_concrete
assets.prompt: Perfectly seamless tileable texture of light gray concrete gas station forecourt, top-down orthographic view, subtle stains and speckles, flat even lighting, no shadows, no objects, no joints or lines, stylized look for a cartoon mobile game, edges must tile seamlessly.

assets.name: ground_grass
assets.prompt: Perfectly seamless tileable texture of dense short stylized lawn grass, very fine high-frequency blade detail, muted sage green tones around #86b06a with subtle darker patches #79a25e, top-down orthographic view, absolutely uniform flat lighting, no border, no frame, no vignette, edges must continue seamlessly, cartoon mobile game style.

assets.name: decal_oil
assets.prompt: Single dark oil stain splat viewed from directly above, one irregular blob with a few small satellite drips, dark brown-black semi-glossy, centered on a pure white background, no shadows, no text, stylized cartoon mobile game decal.

assets.name: icon_benzin
assets.prompt: A green circular badge icon of a fuel pump nozzle, flat game UI style, bold and readable at small size.

assets.name: icon_dizel
assets.prompt: An orange circular badge icon of a fuel pump nozzle, flat game UI style, bold and readable at small size.

assets.name: icon_ev
assets.prompt: A cyan circular badge icon of a lightning bolt over a car silhouette, flat game UI style, bold and readable at small size.

assets.name: app_icon
assets.prompt: iOS app icon, rounded square filling the frame, cute stylized gas station scene: red fuel pump in front, small white station building behind, warm sky, bold saturated colors, Supercell mobile game art style, no text, no watermark.
